changelog: macOS GUI one-file binaries could still load an extracted top-level `jpg2pdf.py` and crash at startup with `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'json'`. The GUI release build now copies the CLI engine to `jpg2pdf_app/engine.py` before freezing and imports that package-local module, eliminating PyInstaller's top-level script/data ambiguity across macOS and Linux.
